如果正常做O, 则OLL skip=1/216*1/72=1/15552;

如果可以控跳点O, 则OLL skip=(1/216)/(1-1/54*6-1/108-1/216)=1/189, LL skip=1/189*1/72=1/13608;

如果会EOLS, 则OLL将是OCLL, OLL skip=(1/216)/(1/54*6+1/108+1/216)=1/27, LL skip=1/27*1/72=1/1944.

假设某人把把跳点O, 每天50把, 坚持20年, 练习量为20*365*50=365000, 则LL skip的期望为365000/13608=26.8.

我现在LL skip有10次, 粗略估计LL skip=10/70000=1/7000. 入魔2017/4/2, 距今天2020/1/3有1006天. 测速量70000, 日均70把. 我这样坚持20年, 练习量为20*365*70=511000. 我LL skip的期望为511000/7000=73.0. 结论就是我总共可以OP连跳73次, 其中已经OP连跳了10次.

二项分布, n次还原中恰好k次OP连跳的概率, 其中p为1/15552.

期望np. 5万次还原里OP连跳的期望是50000/15552

如果会些控棱技术, 单次OP连跳概率会大于1/5552.

One can estimate this roughly using an asymptotic notation for optimal number of moves needed to solve a ‘nxnxn’ Rubix Cube obtained using unknown sources : O(n^2/log(n))

For 3x3 this number is 20, and using this result God’s number for 4x4 comes out to 45. However this is not a proven result.

*** Simulation results ***

1st slot is base case: 15.91 ± 0.01%

2nd slot is base case: 15.65 ± 0.01%

3rd slot is base case: 14.37 ± 0.01%

4th slot is base case: 10.67 ± 0.01%

*** Aggregation ***

The probability of having 0/4 base-case F2L pairs is 54.25 ± 0.01%

The probability of having 1/4 base-case F2L pairs is 35.92 ± 0.01%

The probability of having 2/4 base-case F2L pairs is 8.83 ± 0.01%

The probability of having 3/4 base-case F2L pairs is 0.955 ± 0.001%

The probability of having 4/4 base-case F2L pairs is 0.038 ± 0.001 %

【统计】

Probability of Free Pairs in CFOP:

F2L1 is free = 15.91%

F2L2 is free = 15.65%

F2L3 is free = 14.37%

F2L4 is free = 10.67%

0/4 of F2L are free = 54.25%

1/4 of F2L is free = 35.92%

2/4 of F2L are free = 8.83%

3/4 of F2L are free = 0.955%

4/4 of F2L are free = 0.038%

Credit: Zhouheng Sun (孙舟横).

https://www.jaapsch.net/puzzles/pyraminx.htm

SQ1

God's Algorithm:

In 2005 Mike Masonjones calculated God's Algorithm for the Square-1 in the twist metric. This shows that every position can be solved in at most 13 twists (10.615 on average) or 12 if the middle layer is ignored. The full results for each shape are on a separate page, but the totals can be seen in the table below.

In 2017 Shuang Chen calculated God's Algorithm for the Square-1 in the face turn metric. Every position can be solved in at most 31 face turns (25.134 on average).

Specification for a scramble program: An official scramble sequence must produce a random state from those that require at least 2 moves to solve (equal probability for each state). The following additions/exceptions apply:

4b3a) For blindfolded events, the scramble sequence must orient the puzzle randomly (equal probability for each orientation).

4b3b) 2x2x2 Cube: The (random) state must require at least 4 moves to solve.

4b3c) Skewb: The (random) state must require at least 7 moves to solve.

4b3d) Square-1: The (random) state must require at least 11 moves to solve.

4b3e) 5x5x5 Cube, 6x6x6 Cube, 7x7x7 Cube, and Megaminx: sufficiently many random moves (instead of random state), at least 2 moves to solve.

4b3f) Pyraminx: The (random) state must require at least 6 moves to solve.
